---
title: "<%= title %> Example"
engine: <%= filesafename %>
---

## Example Content

This demonstrates the `<%= filesafename %>` engine processing cells with the `example` language.

```{example}
# This cell will be processed by the <%= filesafename %> engine
print("Hello from example engine!")
```

## Other Engines

Cells with other languages are not processed by this engine:

```{python}
# This will be handled by the python engine (if available)
print("Hello from Python!")
```

## More Example Cells

```{example}
# Another example cell
x = 42
print(f"The answer is {x}")
```
